actionable_insight_candidates.insight: Prioritize crash/latency fixes on critical journeys and add release-level performance telemetry.
Audit brokerage/charges communication and add transparent fee breakdowns before order confirmation.
Improve first-response SLA and reduce repeat-information loops with better ticket context carryover.
Stabilize high-usage features and add targeted QA checks for recurring functional regressions.
Shorten KYC and withdrawal turnaround with proactive status updates and clearer failure reasons.
